channel.title: HackerNews 日本語まとめ & AI要約
channel.description: HackerNewsのトップ記事を毎日日本語翻訳・AI要約して配信

item.title: 2026年7月1日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 The labor share of income in the US is at its lowest post-war level #2 Claude Code Is Steganographically Marking Requests #3 Looking Ahead to Postgres 19 #4 Memoirs of Extraordinary Popular Delusions and the Madness of Crowds (1852) #5 We moved our Bluesky data to Eurosky #6 Building a custom octocopter from scratch with no prior hardware experience #7 European digital ID wallets rely on safety services of Google and Apple #8 Open Source Low Tech #9 Knoppix #10 Zluda 6 release (run unmodified CUDA applications on non-Nvidia GPUs)

item.title: 2026年7月1日（07:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Claude Sonnet 5 #2 Claude Code is steganographically marking requests #3 From brain waves to words: a new path to communication without surgery #4 Claude Science #5 Nano Banana 2 Lite #6 Hatari – Online Atari ST/STE/TT/Falcon Emulator #7 How does a pull-back car work? Illustrated teardown #8 I ported Kubernetes to the browser #9 Leanstral 1.5 #10 TabFM: A zero-shot foundation model for tabular data

item.title: 2026年6月30日（23:00取得） HackerNews トップ記事
item.description: #1 Rocketlab acquires Iridium #2 WATaBoy: JIT-Ing Game Boy Instructions to WASM Beats a Native Interpreter #3 A native graphical shell for SSH #4 What happens when you run a CUDA kernel? #5 Building Principia for Windows XP #6 Sandia National Labs SA3000 8085 CPU #7 HackerRank open sourced its ATS. My resume scored 90/100. Oh wait 74. No – 88 #8 Mag 7 starting to underperform [pdf] #9 Venetian Bridge Brawls in 17th and 18th Century Art #10 European ISPs Want Rightsholders Held Accountable for Overblocking Damage
